raw_consumer_statement: was charged a deposit for {$15000.00} to make sure I have enough money to bid on my card for a charity auction legend on the same day and an hour later I bid on something they charged me {$5600.00} I disputed this charge Citibank gave me a provisional credit and they took the credit back on XX/XX/XXXX I wrote them a letter gave explanation after I did that four different times they responded on XX/XX/XXXX and told me theyll give me the credit back on XX/XX/XXXX and this investigational will be completed its been almost 3 months I dont know what the law states but theyre taking too long to investigate this I want my money back I want the credit this is ridiculous this was just a deposit
